I don't understand. They're playing with me. I just filed a complaint with the Orange gendarmerie in Vaucluse. I'm going to post this online and contribute to the complaint. My sister is a lawyer. We'll take them to court. If they do this to 1,000 people in a day, they make €180,000. That's what fraud is all about. I advise everyone not to use eBay; use another supplier who is more reputable. eBay today is no longer the eBay of the past.
They are getting more and more rotten. Think about all the people hiding car or motorcycle spare parts. At least spare parts, you'll get ripped off. In my next comment, I'll post the gendarmerie complaint.

reviews.author: guido cazzola
reviews.text:
Hi Guido, we’re sorry you’re unhappy with your purchase on this occasion. The electrical part supplied was tested, sealed and in full working order. Unfortunately it seems the issue was misdiagnosed and the wrong part fitted. Once the seal is broken and an electrical part is installed, it can’t be refunded — this is standard practice in the auto parts industry, and wider consumer electronics sector, as fitted electrical items cannot be resold and vehicle faults can damage them.

Of course, if a part is ever genuinely faulty, it’s fully covered under our warranty. We’d also be happy to consider a favourable discount on future orders should you need more parts, we will always make considerations. Good luck with the car.

reviews.author: Felipe Soto
reviews.text:
I purchased an alarm siren from The R129 Co after confirming compatibility using my vehicle’s chassis number. Unfortunately, the first part I received was not compatible, despite their initial confirmation.

However, after contacting them, they acknowledged the mistake and offered to send the correct part at no additional cost, covering all shipping and import fees. Communication during the process had some delays, but in the end, they fulfilled their promise and sent the correct replacement.

The replacement part was a Bosch unit—which is a known OEM supplier for Mercedes-Benz—and after installation, everything worked perfectly.

Although the process had its challenges, I appreciate that they took responsibility and followed through to resolve the issue. In the end, the part was delivered and worked as expected.

Thank you
